summary: Backend-only testing for Sabdia Equipment Management System. Wrote pytest suite (23 tests) against external URL covering auth (admin/supervisor/trade), properties, categories, assets (with trade field redaction), dashboard, full checkout→checkin flow, booking approve/reject RBAC, and admin-only audit/users. All 23 tests PASSED.

minor.issue: Returns 200 OK on create; convention for resource creation is 201. Not blocking.
Does not auto-update asset status to 'Booked'. Approved bookings have no effect on asset availability — may be intentional for MVP but worth confirming with PRD.
Condition 'Minor Damage' sets asset back to 'Available' (only Major Damage / Missing Parts → Maintenance). Confirm with product whether Minor Damage should flag for inspection.
Trade role still sees 'location' field; PRD says trade should not see cost/insurance which is correctly hidden, but consider if location should also be filtered by property.

action_items: Optional: consider returning 201 for POST create endpoints (checkouts, bookings, assets) for REST correctness.
Optional: decide whether booking approval should reserve the asset (set status='Booked' or lock dates).
Optional: route 'Minor Damage' check-ins to Maintenance or a separate review queue depending on policy.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 718 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, assets, checkouts, bookings, admin) and a seed module once features grow.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed requests; since this app uses Bearer tokens (not cookies) it is functionally fine, but set explicit origins for production.
seed() runs on every startup with upsert-on-password-mismatch logic for seed users — good (matches playbook idempotency).
JWT_SECRET is read from env (good). TTL 7 days is appropriate for mobile.
ObjectId correctly excluded via {'_id': 0} projections everywhere.
bcrypt password hashing used correctly (hash starts with $2b$).
Asset trade-role projection hides cost/insurance_value/maintenance_notes — good.
No rate-limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook mentions 5-fail lockout). Not implemented — flag for main agent if required by spec.
/api/auth/login does not set httpOnly cookie — intentional for mobile Bearer-token flow, consistent with credentials doc.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests use existing seeded admin/supervisor/trade users and 10 seeded assets. Tests complete a full checkout+checkin cycle on an Available asset returning it to Available state, and create ephemeral bookings (approved/rejected) — these persist as historical records but do not corrupt state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green. All endpoints in the review request work as specified including role-based filtering (trade sees only own, supervisor sees own property, admin sees all), trade field redaction on assets, 400 on re-checkout of non-available asset, 403 on trade approving bookings / accessing audit & users. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_equipment_api.py is reusable. Bookings persist across test runs so 'pending_bookings' counter grows — clean up via mongo if needed.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found; RCA not applicable.
